name: lean-tos
identity: A temporary encampment or dwelling consisting of several crude, snow-covered lean-tos surrounded by a roaring bonfire and figures cloaked in furs.
current_status: Visible in the distance as the party approaches; smoke curls from it, and figures in furs are gathered around a bonfire.

value: surrounded by figures cloaked in furs

volatile_state.current_activity: serving as a campsite or dwelling with figures gathered around a bonfire
